claim: The embodied sim-to-real preflight is a replayable local differential-drive proof packet: it declares robot units, command logs, predicted and observed traces, tolerances, safety envelope, latency bound, emits EMBODIED_SIM2REAL_FIXTURE_MATCH, rejects five negative controls, and keeps real robot safety, medical robotics, foundation-model, sim-to-real-at-scale, and BuildLang/buildc-native claims out of scope.
scope: Project Telos twenty-ninth-wave prooflesson for proof-carrying embodied robotics claims
decision_summary: The packet verifies the local embodied sim-to-real fixture shape and claim boundary. It does not verify real-world robot safety, medical robotics, embodied foundation models, large-scale sim-to-real transfer, or BuildLang/buildc-native runtime execution.
